nasb.text: Surely the Lord God does nothing Unless He reveals His secret counsel To His servants the prophets.

esv.text: “For the Lord God does nothing without revealing his secret to his servants the prophets.

cnv.text: 如果主耶和華不先把計劃向他的僕人眾先知顯示， 他就不會作任何事。

ccb.text: 的确，主耶和华不向祂的仆人——众先知显明祂的计划， 就不会采取任何行动。
